# Security Checklist: Provide Clear Error Messages for Invalid Inputs

**Purpose**: Validate safe error responses and redaction.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/032-invalid-input-errors/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Error Handling

- [x] CHK-SEC-001 Error responses do not expose stack traces.
- [x] CHK-SEC-002 Sensitive values are redacted in error details.

## Consistency

- [x] CHK-SEC-003 Error schema is consistent across failure types.
